title: cuphea hassleri
intro: Cuphea hassleri, also known as the 'Cigar Plant', is a tropical plant native to Central America, characterized by its unique, cigar-shaped flowers in shades of red, yellow, and orange. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Cuphea hassleri include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. Cuphea hassleri can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
